Organism: Ruegeria pomeroyi (strain ATCC 700808 / DSM 15171 / DSS-3) (Silicibacter pomeroyi)
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the GcvT family. DmdA subfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=S,S-dimethyl-beta-propiothetin + (6S)-5,6,7,8-tetrahydrofolate = 3-(methylsulfanyl)propanoate + (6S)-5-methyl-5,6,7,8-tetrahydrofolate + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:35467, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:16457, ChEBI:CHEBI:18608, ChEBI:CHEBI:49016, ChEBI:CHEBI:57453; EC=2.1.1.269; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:18849431};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in the assimilation of dimethylsulphoniopropionate (DMSP), an important compound in the fixation of carbon in marine phytoplankton, by mediating demethylation of dimethylsulfoniopropionate (DMSP) to methyl-mercaptopropionate (MMPA). The intracellular concentration of DMSP is estimated to be 70 mM. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:17068264, ECO:0000269|PubMed:18849431, ECO:0000269|PubMed:21562561, ECO:0000269|PubMed:22563425}.
